M-024.NAME: device-admin-control
M-024.owns: admin review and enforcement for device state, peer blocks, anomaly investigations and recent anti-abuse context

exports.fn-list-user-devices: Returns device and anomaly state for operator review
exports.fn-list-recent-anti-abuse-events: Returns compact recent anti-abuse event types for operator triage
exports.fn-admin-block-device: Blocks or unblocks one device peer without disabling unrelated account access

phase-75-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Device block/unblock/rotate/revoke controls render inside expanded user device rows and keep explicit confirmation before adminApi mutation.
phase-75-executed-scope.backend-boundary: backend/app/admin/router.py was not changed; existing M-024 endpoints and audit-compatible one-peer semantics are preserved.

M-024.phase-75-evidence: Phase-75 smoke passed DeviceAdminControl markers DEVICE_ACTIONS_IN_USER_EXPANSION, CONFIRMATION_GUARDS_PRESERVED, and AUDIT_CONTRACT_UNCHANGED.
M-024.hotspot: H-010: Device block or revoke must target only one peer or operators will accidentally disable whole accounts
